lsp.justification: Fully correct: it states that Redis core string/object encoding dispatch uses switch/if on o->encoding or o->type with direct named calls, and that the real function-pointer table is RedisModuleTypeMethods/moduleType for OBJ_MODULE only. It also correctly contrasts this with wpa-style ops-table indirection and cites the key module free/population path, with only minor extra line/callsite detail that does not undermine the answer.
